text.p: I wish to place it on record that God's grace led me to a decision to submit your van to Mr as you instucted. I handed over the van and all the documents partaining to it to and three other members of your family on May 23, 2009. I do believe they have reported thus to you. You may please acknowledge receipt of the same.

I am also ready to submit to your proxy the documents of your land with me and and any other essential documents that partain to our personal and business relationship through the years, including all the particulars of , of which you and I were co-directors. The particulars of the Company, including the incorporation certificate, seal, article of association and bank cheque books are ready, if you would let me know who will collect them on your behalf. From my heart, I wish to let you have any thing in my holding which may generate conflict between us in the future. Do please let me know what and to whom you wish them submitted.

I laid claim to a part of the gain from the sale of the vehcleand your land, all of which I handled. But where you think nothing is due to me for my labour, I would bear no grudge but rather wait on God, the actual rewarder to reward me. I therefore wish you to let me know anyother thing of value to you which I am keeping and how you wish me to channel them to you.

Meanwhile, I stand by the account I submitted to you as all I know as the truth and as witnessed by God who we serve. I may not give you cash, not only because I do not have it now but you may demand further clarification where you consider such necessary.

I never could regret my relationship with you. You have been very dear to my heart and I remain very garteful to you. I wish you all the best in life. I pray that God's grace may abound to us so that we do not run the race in vain. May God almighty bless you and your family.

I write you in pain as never before. One of those you told how I cheated you called. I was made to understand that that call was in order to forestall the threat you plan to carry out against me, should I fail to right the wrong I have done you. I am not writing so that you would spare me. You may go ahead with the threat, only let it come from you and not from any other.

You were here when your land was sold. You knew I had the cash as you traveled last February. Why didn't you collect the money from me? You trusted I would not cheat you. What happened to that trust in two months? I have turned a robber. Sorry. You may tell anyone you care to tell, I have become a thief. But tell them also that you gave me the documents of your land. Tell them I managed the land for 5 years without asking for a pay. Tell them we have come 33 full years without counting any losses in our relationship. Tell them about your family, down to your father, and me. Tell them we are not friends but brothers. Tell them how much my own family counts on you. Tell them I once broke the law for you.

Tell them how you proposed a car business to me, always assuring me we were in it together. Did you tell them what I went through to clear the cars? Did you tell them you collected the whole money from the sales without telling me my cut?

Did you tell them how often you changed your mind on how to distribute the money from the sale? Did you tell them I did not bother deducting the cost of clearing the cars before giving you all? I never feared you could cheat me, even if you would take all. And for six months, you never cared to ask how I would reimburse the person who raised the money for the clearing? You knew all these when you broadcast that is keeping your #800,000.00. Did you tell them I had accounted for the money up to #400.000.00? If I deduct the #50,000.00 you asked me to give to my wife and the #100,000.00 I gave the agents clearing your cars, will I still be owing you #800,000.00? You know all this. Why did you say I am owing you #800,000.00? Sorry, you disappoint me. I am owing you #250,000.00.
My heart now loathes your Dodge but I am not letting go of it until I have an alternative. My God will not disappoint me as to keep the van too long. be patient till then.
I wish you to now let me know my share of the Sienna I cleared and sold for you; my share of the #1.15 million. Also let me know my share from the land I managed for these years and sold for you.
As I let go of the Dodge, I will at the same time give you back the documents for your land. From this point, the land is no longer under my custody, not when trust is gone between us.
I wish you all the best.
